SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Continued To Jun-30-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Continued To Jun-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Glen Lerner, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Rowena Altaha, appears through counsel Peyman H. Rad. Respondent, Manzar Azari appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lerner.

Appellant requests a continuance due to illness. Judge Lerner grants the continuance, but wants it noted that the respondent is agreeing to this under protest. Both parties agree to June 30, 2010.

9:17am

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Judgment Entered
